## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Regie for AI-driven content marketing and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Regie is interested in leveraging GrowthX's AI-powered content creation to boost SEO and organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed a discounted package: $30K for 8-week strategy sprint, $12K/mo for ongoing execution](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Katie (Regie) to advocate for budget approval, aiming for late October kickoff if possible](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach aligns well with Regie's needs: AI-native, scalable content production, and potential for programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

## Topics

### Regie's Current Marketing Situation

  - [Katie leads small marketing team (2 people + contractors)](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Content marketer recently resigned](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Flat organic traffic growth historically](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [CEO skeptical of current SEO efforts, believes volume is key](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
  - [Budget constraints due to previous overspending](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Capabilities

  - [AI-powered content creation with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Replaces need for separate SEO agency and AI monitoring tools](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Can handle technical, rapidly-changing topics (e.g., Augmented Code)](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Programmatic content capabilities (e.g., Ramp's spend data pages)](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Success stories: 10x organic traffic (Tiro), 55x clicks, 4x faster content production (Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

### Partnership Structure and Timeline

  - [Phase 1 (8 weeks): Strategy sprint, artifact creation, calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Phase 2: Ongoing execution and content production](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Earliest potential kickoff: Mid-November (tentative Nov 17th latest)](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Annual or semi-annual payment for Phase 2 could expedite process](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)

### Regie's Product and Competitive Landscape

  - [AI-native prospecting platform, comprehensive sales workflow solution](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Main competitors: Outreach, SalesLoft, Gong Engage (incumbents)](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [Emerging competitors: Nooks (strong in dialing), Common Room, Clay](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [Differentiation: AI-driven, dynamic workflow based on prospect intent](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Katie to discuss budget with CFO immediately](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Tyler to send resources for building business case (ROI examples, case studies)](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting with Marcel (GrowthX) and Regie's CEO if needed](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
  - [Tyler to invite Katie to shared Slack for easier collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Align on potential kickoff date and contract terms (annual payment, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/JL5g2xkGVjteugP7H5VzLbJ62DcyKhFo?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
